name: Mini-Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a muffin tin with foil liners.
2. Place one vanilla wafer in each liner.
3. Mix cream cheese, vanilla, and sugar on medium speed until well-blended. Add eggs. Mix well. Pour over wafers, filling 3/4 full.
4. Bake for 25 minutes at 325°F.
5. Remove from pan when cool. Chill. Top with fruit, preserves, nuts, or chocolate. Be creative!
